# B41 - Based on AI

> B41 is an AI automation company that builds custom AI systems for logistics
> operations. We replace manual, repetitive work with intelligent automation -
> reducing manual work by 70%, enabling 3x faster processing, and running 24/7.

B41 specializes in AI solutions for freight, supply chain, and logistics companies.
We build production-ready systems that integrate with existing workflows and ERP systems.

Key facts:
- Based in Riga, Latvia
- Contact: sales@b41.ai
- Telegram: t.me/ethnoh
- WhatsApp: +37120261317
- Services: Document OCR, Sales Automation, AI Assistants, Custom AI Systems

## Services

- [Document OCR & Processing](https://b41.ai/#services): Automated extraction,
  validation and routing of logistics documents (invoices, bills of lading,
  freight quotes). Reduces manual processing from hours to seconds.

- [Sales Pipeline Automation](https://b41.ai/#services): End-to-end CRM automation
  that qualifies leads, sends follow-up sequences, and updates records automatically.

- [AI Assistants](https://b41.ai/#services): Private GPT-powered assistants trained
  on company SOPs, rate cards, and operational procedures for instant team answers.

- [Custom AI Systems](https://b41.ai/#services): Bespoke AI workflows built around
  existing ERP, TMS, and logistics management systems.

## Portfolio

- [OCR Invoice Processor](https://b41.ai/#portfolio): Built for Conway Container
  Solutions - automated freight invoice extraction using OCR and AI.

- [Sales Pipeline Automation](https://b41.ai/#portfolio): Built for Speed-IT -
  end-to-end CRM automation with zero human touch on routine tasks.

- [Logistics AI Assistant](https://b41.ai/#portfolio): Built for Latflex - private
  GPT assistant trained on company SOPs and rate cards.

- [Document Classification Engine](https://b41.ai/#portfolio): Built for Conway
  Container Solutions - AI that classifies 14 types of logistics documents.

- [Operations Dashboard & Alerts](https://b41.ai/#portfolio): Built for Speed-IT -
  real-time AI monitoring with anomaly detection and proactive alerts.
